# algocline

> LLM amplification engine. Pure Lua strategies executed via `alc.run(ctx)`; this index lists every installed strategy package with a one-liner and a link to its full narrative.

## filter

- [screener](narrative/screener.md): Multi-stage idea filter: dedup, rules, LLM screen

## infrastructure

- [portfolio](narrative/portfolio.md): Portfolio store with eval history and Card emission

## optimization

- [bandit](narrative/bandit.md): Thompson Sampling with Beta-Binomial model

## sourcing

- [sourcer](narrative/sourcer.md): Thompson Sampling idea sourcer with theme/source arms
